steps.t: Karazgar may be found somewhere within the ruins of Gostador. You have returned to Dol Dhannen in search of Karazgar and have descended into Gostador.…
There may be more left to discover within the Room of Voices.
There may be more left to discover within the Room of Voices.
Sigileth is standing at the edge of the Room of Voices in Gostador. You have witnessed many events of Karazgar's past, but did not find Karazgar in Go…
